classes.meaning: The local role did not complete within its bounded execution window.
The model output could not be decoded into the role's closed semantic body.
A claim referenced evidence outside the authorized material.
A claim referenced a deterministic receipt outside the authorized material.
Final synthesis attempted to release a claim without unanimous reviewer approval.
The request intent, specialist set, or capability set did not match the held-out requirement.
A required finding, uncertainty, conflict, handoff, or final section was absent.
A material claim lacked an authorized evidence or receipt reference.
A numerical claim was not linked to the required deterministic calculation receipt.
Material conflicting evidence or counterevidence was silently ignored.
The role exceeded its scope, gave personalized advice, or made a forbidden causal or certainty claim.
The reconstructed typed artifact failed deterministic validation.
The case failed but did not match a more specific frozen class.
